{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044133A601F23CDED7D1344D50"}"},"total":614},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7396712988912010046","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"乳腺通了！！内容简洁不拖沓，不会为了凑字数，一阵风都能写个800字！！很喜欢这种节奏，简洁明了又不失幽默，爱了爱了。当然更快一点就更好了！！！[送心][送心][送心]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1722184792,"group_id":"7382474413385452568","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嘻嘻哈哈掩饰不了我内心的暴躁","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0rAJf9Xdwf3rmIIVww4HNv/98Zt5NAe7B9Ho3LWRQ8n","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e0678bbd779e45aa98da9de81184e308~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705633&x-signature=09T6AJSPN4yZSFZCFN2ATjPrL74%3D","user_id":"3927880710491511","user_name":"芒果吃出榴莲味"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3927880710491511","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7382474413385452568","book_info":{"abstract":"重生+成长+励志+虐渣+破镜不重圆+男二上位
简介一
前世，顾锦追了贺阳十五年，成为了他的妻，她深知他不爱，可看到他深夜与“白月光”热吻的热搜，她提了离婚，心如死灰，被一辆车撞死
重生到高考前三月，顾锦表示老娘不追了，她一心扑在学习上，高考考了高分，成为全国状元，入了清北大学
清大校园里，贺阳看到顾锦跟人手挽手，红着眼眶把她堵在角落里，“为什么不追了？”
顾锦：都重生了，谁还稀罕你啊
————简介二
本书又名【出轨的爹，爱赌的妈，舔狗的弟，重生我笑哈哈】顾锦上辈子异常凄惨，高考前被人推下楼梯，手臂粉碎性骨折，百日誓师会当日被舔狗亲弟算计，记了大过
无缘参加高考，被赌徒亲妈卖到黑工厂，好不容易逃出工厂，拼搏十年，嫁给了高中一见钟情的男人
贺阳不爱她，还和毁了她人生的“白月光”当街热吻，顾锦选择了离婚，当日被车撞死
重生一世，她发现绅士老爹出轨多年，还有个私生女，正是上辈子毁了她人生的人，亲妈陷入“杀猪盘”陷阱中，舔狗亲弟明恋私生女
这操蛋的人生，顾锦撸起袖子，揭穿老爹真面目，把亲妈送进戒毒所，打弟弟把趁早，顺便她还考了全国状元
——
问：如果给你一次重生的机会，你会选择回到过去的那个阶段","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/38b255bdea038cf412081e0de7fe3860","author":"林兮欢","author_id":"","book_id":"7382474413385452568","book_name":"出轨爹，爱赌妈，重生我笑呵呵","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e89890","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8918人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":749,"name":"青春甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=749&name=青春甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":457,"name":"虐渣","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=457&name=虐渣&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":523,"name":"前世今生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=523&name=前世今生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7382474631166312984","read_count":"8918","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"643398"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"297","tags":"青春甜宠,现代言情,校园,重生,甜宠,虐渣,打脸,前世今生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/317e55725378c5f5ccd80a383c49344b~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779309693&x-signature=JYyf6tRrt7YI0kQ73aCUKXekX2E%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3412538295061096","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"92"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322044133A601F23CDED7D1344D50"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":9,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2581,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":19656,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":5435},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7435940608161399577","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看，剧情很新颖，以一条主线贯穿全文，同时写出了大多数人的结局，而且女主的心结也在其中打开了。女主的父母也很爱女主，除了女主的弟弟一直在欺负女主，但最后也悔悟了，并且女主并没有原谅他，女主的父母和小姨也没有要求女主原谅她弟弟，真的超好。男女主之间的感情也很好，虽然开始得很晚，但是她们也很好。女主身边的朋友都有了很好的结局，特别是许九月最后和江城在一起了。真的超好看，和其他的文不一样，超好看，推荐推荐！！！！！！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731319869,"group_id":"7382474413385452568","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1BHY5NQgkh73mfpuNgyVOY=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/376a06d48d2146b394333296fe3b8e5d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708810&x-signature=dofR4xyGpq4Ag1PmDLtyjRhnnAE%3D","user_id":"100701174602","user_name":"梦幻紫狐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"100701174602","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7382474413385452568","book_info":{"abstract":"重生+成长+励志+虐渣+破镜不重圆+男二上位
